/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/openamp.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/openamp.dir/openamp_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openamp.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openamp.dir/src/audio/audio_backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openamp.dir/src/audio/pipewire_backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openamp.dir/src/audio/alsa_backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openamp.dir/src/audio/midi_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openamp.dir/src/ui/main_window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openamp.dir/src/ui/knob_widget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openamp.dir/src/ui/pedal_widget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openamp.dir/src/ui/preset_browser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openamp.dir/src/ui/effects_panel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openamp.dir/src/ui/amp_panel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openamp.dir/src/ui/settings_dialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openamp.dir/src/ui/theme.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openamp.dir/src/ui/meter_widget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openamp.dir/src/ui/ir_panel_widget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openamp.dir/src/ui/latency_display_widget.cpp.o -o openamp  dsp-core/src/libopenamp-dsp.a /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6QuickControls2.so.6.10.2 -lpipewire-0.3 -lasound /usr/lib/libQt6Quick.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Qml.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2
